objective.statement: Read req.md carefully. It contains the full requirements for a flight booking website. Build a working implementation of this website. Use Next.js 14 (App Router) with TypeScript for the frontend, and a Node.js/Express backend with PostgreSQL. Create the full project structure, database schema, API routes, and frontend pages. Focus on the core booking flow: flight search, results listing, booking with passenger details, payment mock, confirmation, and booking management. Include an admin panel skeleton. Make it actually runnable with npm install && npm run dev.

success_criteria.description: Produce a codebase state that better satisfies the stated objective and verify it with available evidence.
